evals.prompt: Plan my fall content for September and October.
expect: seasonal-map anchors window to Sep to Oct peak
idea cluster returns ideas across multiple pillars
calendar-slot assigns publish dates within the window
trend-check runs conditionally for ideas with trend claims

evals.prompt: What moody fall decor trends are hot right now?
expect: trend-check runs before any trend claim
data older than 14 days is marked stale
stale data is returned with the stale flag, not dropped
seasonal-map returns the May to Jun peak window
urgency reflects current month relative to that window
no invented seasonal peaks outside the four documented ones
